---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

<!-- Thanks for taking the time to suggest a feature! Please fill out this template to help us understand your needs. -->

## Problem Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what problem you're trying to solve or what improvement you'd like. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## Use Cases

<!-- How would this feature be used? Please provide specific use cases. -->

## Additional Information

<!-- Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched the existing issues and haven't found a similar feature request
- [ ] I have provided all the requested information
- [ ] This is not a duplicate request
